achievement: Ensured high data quality by processing and validating over 20,000 records with 98% accuracy, supporting integrity of datasets used in compliance-sensitive ML model training and downstream reporting.

Applied exploratory data analysis (EDA) techniques and collaborated with cross-functional teams to align data workflows with key risk and performance indicators (KRIs/KPIs), enhancing accuracy and relevance of reporting outputs.
Built anomaly detection and pattern recognition tools to identify data quality issues and operational risks, enhancing integrity of datasets leveraged in risk reporting and regulatory analysis.
Automated data processing pipelines to streamline repetitive data preparation tasks, improving reporting efficiency and reducing manual errors by 40%.
Analyzed performance monitoring and reporting accuracy enhancements by developing data visualizations and dashboards in Amazon Quick sight, managing insight generation for operational optimization.
Utilized Jira and Confluence in an Agile team to manage workflows and sprint planning.
Calculate and report Net Asset Values (NAV) for assigned funds accurately and on schedule, ensuring compliance with State Street policies and client requirements.
Reconcile cash, assets, and other financial transactions to maintain accuracy across all accounts. Identify and resolve discrepancies, contributing to timely and accurate financial reporting.
Review and process fund expenses, management fees, and performance fees in compliance with client agreements and industry standards.
Associated in preparing fund data for audits and regulatory reporting. Ensure all fund activities comply with relevant regulations and State Street’s internal audit standards.

professional_summary: Highly motivated postgraduate big data analyst with a solid foundation in advanced machine learning, data engineering, and scalable system deployment. Demonstrated expertise in Python, PySpark, Docker, and cloud-native technologies, committed to furnishing analytical rigour and innovative solutions to drive strategic business outcomes and operational excellence. Seeking to contribute technical proficiency and a passion for data-driven decision-making in a challenging and growth-oriented environment.
